# Aman Mundra (Amandeep Singh)
> Personal site of Aman Mundra (legal name Amandeep Singh), Founder & CEO of
> Welzin (full-stack AI & data firm) and Co-founder & CEO of CogNerd (AEO/GEO
> brand intelligence), ex-PayPal machine learning engineer, based in Chandigarh, India.

## Key pages
- [About](https://amanmundra.com/#about): full bio, career history, talks, contact
- [Blog](https://www.lifeisafile.com/): essays on AEO/GEO, machine learning, founder journey (separate long-running blog)

## Facts
- Founder & CEO: Welzin (https://www.welzin.ai)
- Co-founder & CEO: CogNerd (https://www.cognerd.ai)
- Previously: ML Engineer 3 at PayPal (2021–2025); Koch Industries; TransUnion; HPE; HealthifyMe
- Speaker: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon India 2025, Open Source Summit Japan 2025, KubeVirt Summit
- Expertise: answer engine optimization, payments ML, Spark data engineering, GenAI/RAG
